SAM4 Performance Report

Detection Accuracy & Transparency

We publish our detection boundaries because no technology detects everything. Transparency builds trust.

Core Asset Accuracy

90.8%

Pump, Fan, Conveyor

All Assets Average

87.2%

Across all asset types

False Alert Rate

0.32%

6 false in 1,874 cases

Data Period

January 2024 – February 2026 | 1,874 resolved incidents

Tier 1 – Early Stage
5/5 (100%)

Small sample size (5 cases). Continued monitoring recommended.

Compressors

Tier 3 – Limited Data
3/8 (37.5%)

Limited deployment history. Not recommended for critical applications yet.

Overall Performance

Process issues

Air lock

82.1%

Contamination

81.2%

Elec. unbalance

68.0%

Coupling unbal.

57.1%

Bearing degrad.

45.9%

Root Cause Prevention

Detecting Upstream Failures

SAM4 detects the upstream root causes that lead to catastrophic seal and bearing failures — preventing failures before they cascade.

100%

Misalignment

Primary driver of premature seal wear and uneven bearing loading

96.3%

Mechanical unbalance

Vibration that degrades both seals and bearings over time

86.7%

Cavitation

Pressure shocks that damage seals and accelerate bearing fatigue

What SAM4 Monitors

  • Complete drivetrain via electrical signature
  • Failure modes altering torque or load
  • Gradual degradation patterns
  • Acute mechanical events
  • Upstream root causes of seal/bearing failure
  • Multi-failure cascades

Known Limitations

  • Mechanical seal leakage (directly)
  • Motor bearing degradation (early stage)
  • Stator shorts (localized)
  • Chemical attack / material aging
  • Instrumentation faults
  • Other failure modes

Our Philosophy

Transparent About Our Limits

We publish our detection boundaries because no technology detects everything. Transparency builds trust.

See what SAM4 can detect on your assets

Request a demo to see how SAM4 performs on your equipment and which failure modes matter most for your operation.
